title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.26. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a critical level of severity. 
 The high temperature is accompanied by high humidity, with an Umidita of 84%, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The Vento is relatively low at 9.7 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
